name: aotrino
description: npm workspaces for AOTrino: the @aotrino/* front-end packages and the JS-based samples that consume them. Nothing here is published to a registry - samples resolve @aotrino/* through workspace symlinks.

scripts.//build:libs: the @aotrino/* libraries, in dependency order: each one's types come from the previous one's dist, so they must build client -> react -> fluent. npm does not guarantee an order for workspace prepare scripts, which is why this list is explicit and lives here rather than in a prepare script.
scripts.build:libs: npm run build -w @aotrino/client && npm run build -w @aotrino/react && npm run build -w @aotrino/fluent
